ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if ! git rev-parse HEAD^ >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "no parent (shallow clone) — deploy"; exit 1; fi; if git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- src public package.json next.config.* tsconfig.json drizzle.config.* postcss.config.* tailwind.config.* vercel.json; then echo "only data/* or docs/* changed — skip deploy"; exit 0; else echo "code changed — deploy"; exit 1; fi'
